domain: Marshall Islands rebbelib stick chart (Micronesian wayfinding): coconut-frond midrib framework + shells = island positions + threads = ocean swell directions; 4 main swells (rilib backbone + kaelib + bungdockerik + bundockeing); 3 chart types: mattang abstract teaching + meddo local + rebbelib comprehensive; charts pre-memorized + not consulted during voyage; individual-only interpretation by chart-maker; pre-literate spatial-memory tool
specific_mechanism: REBBELIB-PRE-VOYAGE-CHART-COMPILE-MEMORY: pre-voyage chart-compilation memory with K-swell tiers + island-shell anchors + 3-chart-type curricular + personal-key + low-frequency consult. (1) Pre-voyage compile phase: at inference start, model studies compiled chart embedding e_chart (precomputed task structure) for fixed K-token internalization window; afterwards e_chart accessed only via sparse-attention prior. (2) K=4 ocean-swell tier memory: 4 hierarchical memory tiers (backbone primary + kaelib secondary + bungdockerik tertiary + bundockeing quaternary) — each tier holds abstraction level. (3) Island-anchor shells: discrete reference-anchor memory entries at salient task entities (analog of attention sinks at named-entity locations). (4) 3-chart-type curricular: mattang (training-time abstract pattern learning) -> meddo (task-subgoal pattern) -> rebbelib (full-task comprehensive chart) — model is curricularly trained from abstract to comprehensive. (5) Personal-key interpretation: e_id = model-specific embedding key required to unlock chart (per-model finetune-specific compile, only same model can read its own pre-compile). (6) Sense-based-feel inference: chart not re-consulted; cross-attention to e_chart at low frequency (every N steps) with body-feel-style proprioceptive accumulation. (7) Differs from R454 TIERED-KV (3-tier KV, no pre-voyage + no personal key) and R504 GGANTIJA-APSIDAL-CORBEL (5-apse branching, no pre-compile + no curricular) by pre-voyage compile + K=4 swell-tier + island-shell anchor + 3-chart-type curricular + personal-key interpretation + low-frequency consult inference.
llm_application: REBBELIB-PRE-VOYAGE-CHART-COMPILE-MEMORY pre-voyage compile-phase e_chart embedding + K=4 ocean-swell tier memory hierarchy + island-shell discrete reference-anchor sinks + 3-chart-type curricular mattang-meddo-rebbelib + personal-key per-model interpretation + sense-based low-frequency consult during inference (1-in-N). Differs from R408 ICELANDIC. R428 WAVE-BOWL. R442 ADINKRA. R454 TIERED-KV (closest — 3-tier KV, no pre-voyage compile + no personal-key). R470 CHILOTE 3-tier landmark. R479 OVOO-LANDMARK-TIER. R492 STALLO-MULTIFUNC-NODE. R504 GGANTIJA-APSIDAL-CORBEL (closest — 5-apse branching, no pre-compile + no curricular). Differs from MemOS Memory OS + MemAgents + Memory Age Survey + Awesome AI Memory by pre-voyage compile e_chart + 3-chart-type curricular + personal-key interpretation + low-frequency consult. Differs by PRE-VOYAGE COMPILE + K-SWELL TIER + ISLAND-SHELL ANCHOR + 3-CHART CURRICULAR + PERSONAL-KEY + LOW-FREQ CONSULT.
novelty_claim: MemOS + MemAgents + Memory Age Survey + tiered KV memory + curricular learning literature cover multi-tier memory + curricular hierarchy + anchor space. REBBELIB-PRE-VOYAGE-CHART-COMPILE-MEMORY adds (a) pre-voyage compile-phase + (b) K=4 ocean-swell tier + (c) island-shell anchor + (d) 3-chart-type curricular + (e) personal-key per-model + (f) low-frequency consult inference. Recombination — borderline lookup.
